name: @sorane/astro-backend-wasm
description: WASM build of sorane-astro-backend for @sorane/astro (no native CLI install)

scripts.build:wasm: wasm-pack build ../../rust/sorane-astro-backend --target web --release --out-dir ../../packages/astro-backend-wasm/wasm --out-name sorane_astro_backend && rm -f wasm/package.json wasm/.gitignore
